diagnosis: The level features a long horizontal corridor at y≈818 with periodic ladder structures (L) and floating 3-tile platforms (X,X,X) creating vertical variation. The player made progress but fell once at x=8479,y=36 (near the top-right) after 145s, then respawned and repeated large sections. The trace shows extensive backtracking around x=7950-8300,y=150-880 where the player attempted vertical climbs repeatedly, suggesting the exit (E at row 5, near x=8000) was reachable but the final ascent was inconsistent. The player completed 6 enemy kills and took 3 hits, indicating combat engagement. The rating of 3 reflects improved variety over prior 'flat' levels but unfinished completion due to a demanding late vertical sequence.

lessons.lesson: Vertical challenge clusters near the level end amplify perceived difficulty spikes — players who traverse long horizontal stretches expect the finale to test mastery, not introduce new traversal demands without checkpoints.
conditions: long horizontal traversal precedes final vertical section
no mid-level checkpoints or safe zones before finale
final section requires repeated precise climbs
lessons.outcome: player falls late, respawns to start, repeats 100+ seconds of content, rates level 3/5 despite enjoying variety
